step_rationale: Heat-shock co-chaperone in plaque inflammatory and lipid-homeostasis pathways.
mechanism: DNAJB6 regulates protein folding and cellular stress responses affecting macrophage and endothelial function in atherosclerotic plaques.

references.title: Identification of Key Genes as Early Warning Signals of Acute Myocardial Infarction Based on Weighted Gene Correlation Network Analysis and Dynamic Network Biomarker Algorithm.
